title: Access/set user status
excerpt:
The ability to access a user’s status and get a webhook when it changes would be fantastic. Simple use - sync status with other applications (Teams/Zoom/Outlook/Webex/Slack). 
Or this could just be a feature of the appli…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to access a user’s status and get a webhook when it changes would be fantastic. Simple use - sync status with other applications (Teams/Zoom/Outlook/Webex/Slack).

Or this could just be a feature of the application to allow those to sync so we dont have to write it in the API.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@anon29275264

That’s a great suggestion! I definitely see how this could be helpful. Let’s see what the community thinks, too.

Thank you for always keeping an eye out for potential improvements to monday.com I appreciate it!

-Alex
